public int countNumbers(String l, String r, int b) {
    String rStr = r;
    String lMinus1 = subtractOne(l, b);
    long countR = f(rStr, b);
    long countLMinus1 = lMinus1.equals("-1") ? 0 : f(lMinus1, b);
    int result = (int) ((countR - countLMinus1 + MOD) % MOD);
    return result;
}

public static String subtractOne(String s, int b) {
    char[] arr = s.toCharArray();
    int i = arr.length - 1;
    while (i >= 0) {
        int digit = arr[i] - '0';
        if (digit == 0) {
            arr[i] = (char) (b - 1 + '0');
            i--;
        } else {
            arr[i] = (char) (digit - 1 + '0');
            break;
        }
    }
    if (i == -1) {
        // all digits were zero, so it's zero, subtracting 1 gives -1
        return "-1";
    }
    // Check if the first digit is zero (only possible if all digits were zero except the first)
    // Wait, no. Because in the loop, if i becomes -1, we return -1. Else, the first digit is non-zero.
    // So, the result is the array from 0 to i, but wait, no. Because after the loop, i is the position where the subtraction stopped.

    // So, the result is the array from 0 to i, but wait, no. Because the array is modified in place.

    // So, the result is the array, but leading zeros may have been introduced.

    // But wait, the original number is in base b without leading zeros. So, after subtracting 1, the result may have leading zeros only if the result is zero.

    // So, after the subtraction, we need to check if the first character is zero. If so, we need to remove leading zeros.

    // For example, subtracting 1 from "10" in base 10 gives "09", which is "9".

    // So, after the subtraction, we need to remove leading zeros.

    // So, after the loop, we need to find the first non-zero digit.

    int firstNonZero = 0;
    while (firstNonZero < arr.length && arr[firstNonZero] == '0') {
        firstNonZero++;
    }
    if (firstNonZero == arr.length) {
        // all zeros, return "0"
        return "0";
    }
    String result = new String(arr).substring(firstNonZero);
    return result;
}

So, the code for combination is:

private long comb(int n, int k) {
    if (k < 0 || k > n) return 0;
    return fact[n] * invFact[k] % MOD * invFact[n - k] % MOD;
}

Now, the DP function for part2.

Implementing the DP:

So, the code can be:

private long dp(int pos, int last, boolean tight, String s, int b, long[][][] memo) {
    if (pos == s.length()) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (memo[pos][last][tight ? 1 : 0] != -1) {
        return memo[pos][last][tight ? 1 : 0];
    }
    long res = 0;
    int maxDigit = tight ? (s.charAt(pos) - '0') : (b - 1);
    for (int d = 0; d <= maxDigit; d++) {
        if (pos == 0) {
            // first digit, can't be zero
            if (d == 0) continue;
            if (d < last) continue; // since last is the previous digit, but for pos=0, last is -1 or something?
            // Wait, for pos=0, last is not set. So, for the first digit, d can be from 1 to maxDigit, and last is set to d for the next position.
            // So, in the first position, d must be >=1 and <= maxDigit.
            // Also, since it's the first digit, the next digits must be >=d.
            if (d >= 1) {
                res += dp(pos + 1, d, tight && (d == maxDigit), s, b, memo);
                res %= MOD;
            }
        } else {
            if (d >= last) {
                boolean newTight = tight && (d == maxDigit);
                res += dp(pos + 1, d, newTight, s, b, memo);
                res %= MOD;
            }
        }
    }
    memo[pos][last][tight ? 1 : 0] = res;
    return res;
}

private long dp(int pos, int last, boolean tight, String s, int b, long[][][] memo) {
    if (pos == s.length()) {

public int countNumbers(String l, String r, int b) {
    String rStr = r;
    String lMinus1 = subtractOne(l, b);
    long countR = f(rStr, b);
    long countLMinus1 = lMinus1.equals("-1") ? 0 : f(lMinus1, b);
    int result = (int) ((countR - countLMinus1 + MOD) % MOD);
    return result;
}

public static String subtractOne(String s, int b) {
    char[] arr = s.toCharArray();
    int i = arr.length - 1;
    while (i >= 0) {
        int digit = arr[i] - '0';
        if (digit == 0) {
            arr[i] = (char) (b - 1 + '0');
            i--;
        } else {
            arr[i] = (char) (digit - 1 + '0');
            break;
        }
    }
    if (i == -1) {

        return "-1";

    // So, after the subtraction, we need to check if the first character is zero. If so, we need to remove leading zeros.

    int firstNonZero = 0;

        firstNonZero++;
    }

        return "0";
    }
    String result = new String(arr).substring(firstNonZero);

}

private long comb(int n, int k) {
    if (k < 0 || k > n) return 0;
    return fact[n] * invFact[k] % MOD * invFact[n - k] % MOD;
}

private long dp(int pos, int last, boolean tight, String s, int b, long[][][] memo) {
    if (pos == s.length()) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (memo[pos][last][tight ? 1 : 0] != -1) {
        return memo[pos][last][tight ? 1 : 0];
    }
    long res = 0;
    int maxDigit = tight ? (s.charAt(pos) - '0') : (b - 1);
    for (int d = 0; d <= maxDigit; d++) {
        if (pos == 0) {
            // first digit, can't be zero
            if (d == 0) continue;
            if (d < last) continue; // since last is the previous digit, but for pos=0, last is -1 or something?
            // Wait, for pos=0, last is not set. So, for the first digit, d can be from 1 to maxDigit, and last is set to d for the next position.
            // So, in the first position, d must be >=1 and <= maxDigit.
            // Also, since it's the first digit, the next digits must be >=d.
            if (d >= 1) {
                res += dp(pos + 1, d, tight && (d == maxDigit), s, b, memo);
                res %= MOD;
            }
        } else {
            if (d >= last) {
                boolean newTight = tight && (d == maxDigit);
                res += dp(pos + 1, d, newTight, s, b, memo);
                res %= MOD;
            }

private long dp(int pos, int last, boolean tight, String s, int b, long[][][] memo) {
    if (pos == s.length()) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (memo[pos][last][tight ? 1 : 0] != -1) {
        return memo[pos][last][tight ? 1 : 0];
    }
    long res = 0;
    int maxDigit = tight ? (s.charAt(pos) - '0') : (b - 1);
    int start = (pos == 0) ? 1 : last;
    for (int d = start; d <= maxDigit; d++) {
        boolean newTight = tight && (d == maxDigit);
        res += dp(pos + 1, d, newTight, s, b, memo);
        res %= MOD;
    }
    memo[pos][last][tight ? 1 : 0] = res;
    return res;
}

private static final int MOD = 10_000_000_007;
private static long[] fact = new long[201];
private static long[] invFact = new long[201];

static {
    fact[0] = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= 200; i++) {
        fact[i] = fact[i-1] * i % MOD;
    }
    invFact[200] = modInverse(fact[200], MOD);
    for (int i = 199; i >=0; i--) {
        invFact[i] = invFact[i+1] * (i+1) % MOD;
    }
}
